channel.title: Phoneum on Tech Tracker

item.title: Phoneum Vs RFX Cloud Mining ? - Should You Use ?
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-mneyNT_yVUk/XoIdGx-iEJI/AAAAAAAABRE/TZLkNToaW_4b3QeXKJdDeul43kkqUO0xgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/IMG_20200111_105332_780-02-16.jpeg" alt=""> When there are very few apps in playstore for doing crypto mining this app top up in the list Phoneum and RFX even though the apps looks attract you the reality differ alot and if you are considering this apps to mine this own crypto coins this reality should be known to users. Phoneum Vs RFX clouding apps there are alot of pros and cons if some sides phoneum looks little better and some other sides rfx coin looks better.
